description: Create a 25 kW grid-connected photovoltaic system for the 4StoreyBuilding project located at C:\Users\Docker\Documents\eQUEST 3-65 Projects\4StoreyBuilding\4StoreyBuilding.inp. Configure the PV generator with a 25.0 kW capacity, 20-degree fixed tilt, 180-degree azimuth (South), and 0.18 efficiency. Ensure the annual simulation results reflect the generated electricity and save the project.
